lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਗੁਣੀ ਬਖਸਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: avagan gunee bakhasaaeaa har siau liv laaee |
lines.english: Through merits, their demerits are forgiven, and they embrace love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਸੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ghar hee so pir paaeaa sachai sabad veechaar |1|
lines.english: They find their Husband Lord within their own home, contemplating the True Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har var paaeaa kaamanee gur mel milaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The soul-bride then obtains the Lord as her Husband; meeting the Guru, this union comes about. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੑੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik pir hadoor na jaananaee doojai bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: Some do not know the Presence of their Husband Lord; they are deluded by duality and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai man sach vasiaa sachee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: Those whose minds are filled with the True Lord, perform truthful actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਪਾਇਨੑਿ ਡੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਦੁਖੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kiau paaeina ddohaaganee dukhee rain vihaae |2|
lines.english: How can the forsaken brides meet Him? Their life night passes in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈਆ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dohaaganee bharam bhulaaeea koorr bol bikh khaeh |
lines.english: The forsaken brides wander around, deluded by doubt; telling lies, they eat poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਹਜ ਸਿਉ ਸਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin seveh sehaj siau sache maeh samaae |3|
lines.english: Night and day, they serve the Lord with poise, and are absorbed in the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੁੰਞੀ ਸੇਜ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: pir na jaanan aapanaa sunyee sej dukh paeh |4|
lines.english: They do not know their Husband Lord, and upon their deserted bed, they suffer in misery. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਮਤੁ ਮਨ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib ek hai mat man bharam bhulaeh |
lines.english: The True Lord is the One and only; do not be deluded by doubt, O my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਹਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur poochh sevaa kareh sach niramal man vasaeh |5|
lines.english: Consult with the Guru, serve the True Lord, and enshrine the Immaculate Truth within your mind. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee sadaa pir paaeaa haumai aap gavaae |
lines.english: The happy soul-bride always finds her Husband Lord; she banishes egotism and self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਗਏ ਪਲੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree kar ge palai kichh na paae |
lines.english: Those who shouted, "Mine, mine!" have departed, without obtaining anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਸੇਤੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗਹਿ ਰਹੀ ਸਚੀ ਸੇਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: pir setee anadin geh rahee sachee sej sukh paae |6|
lines.english: She remains attached to her Husband Lord, night and day, and she finds peace upon His Bed of Truth. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: so pir meraa ek hai ekas siau liv laae |
lines.english: That Husband Lord of mine is the One and only; I am in love with the One alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਡੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਈ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: mehal naahee ddohaaganee ant gee pachhutaae |7|
lines.english: The separated one does not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, and departs, repenting in the end. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਲੋੜਹਿ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇ ॥੮॥੧੧॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: naanak je sukh lorreh kaamanee har kaa naam man vasaae |8|11|33|
lines.english: O Nanak, if the soul-bride longs for peace, she should enshrine the Lord's Name within her mind. ||8||11||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਚਖਾਇਓਨੁ ਰਸੁ ਆਇਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit jinaa chakhaaeon ras aaeaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord has caused to drink in the Ambrosial Nectar, naturally, intuitively, enjoy the sublime essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachaa veparavaahu hai tis no til na tamaae |1|
lines.english: The True Lord is care-free; he does not have even an iota of greed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਚਾ ਵਰਸਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit sachaa varasadaa guramukhaa mukh paae |
lines.english: The True Ambrosial Nectar rains down, and trickles into the mouths of the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਹਰੀਆਵਲਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man sadaa hareeaavalaa sahaje har gun gaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Their minds are forever rejuvenated, and they naturally, intuitively, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਸੁਆਦੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋੁ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jinaa pir kaa suaad na aaeo jo dhur likhiaa so kamaeh |2|
lines.english: Those who do not enjoy the sublime taste of their Husband Lord, act according to their pre-ordained destiny. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਦਰਿ ਖੜੀਆ ਬਿਲਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sadaa dohaaganee dar kharreea bilalaeh |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are forever forsaken brides; they cry out and bewail at the Lord's Gate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੀਜੇ ਸਚੁ ਜਮੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh beeje sach jamai sach naam vaapaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh plants the seed of the True Name, and it sprouts. He deals in the True Name alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਤੁ ਲਾਹੈ ਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਦੇਇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo it laahai laaeian bhagatee dee bhanddaar |3|
lines.english: Those whom the Lord has attached to this profitable venture, are granted the treasure of devotional worship. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਭੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa sohaaganee bhai bhagat seegaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is forever the true, happy soul-bride; she adorns herself with the fear of God and devotion to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਰਖਹਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin raaveh pir aapanaa sach rakheh ur dhaar |4|
lines.english: Night and day, she enjoys her Husband Lord; she keeps Truth enshrined within her heart. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa pir raaviaa aapanaa tinaa vittahu bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who have enjoyed their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa pir kai sang raheh vichahu aap gavaae |5|
lines.english: They dwell forever with their Husband Lord; they eradicate self-conceit from within. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਵੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sej sukhaalee pir ravai haumai trisanaa maar |6|
lines.english: They enjoy their Husband Lord upon His cozy bed, having conquered their ego and desire. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan man seetal mukh ujale pir kai bhaae piaar |
lines.english: Their bodies and minds are cooled and soothed, and their faces are radiant, from the love and affection of their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa ghar aaeaa gur kai het apaar |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, He comes into our homes, through our infinite Love for the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਕੇਵਲ ਏਕੁ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: var paaeaa sohaaganee keval ek muraar |7|
lines.english: The happy soul-bride obtains the One Lord as her Husband. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਗੁਨਹ ਬਖਸਾਇ ਲਇਓਨੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe gunah bakhasaae leon mele melanahaar |
lines.english: All of her sins are forgiven; the Uniter unites her with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਖਣੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਜੇ ਸੁਣਿ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੮॥੧੨॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aakhan aakheeai je sun dhare piaar |8|12|34|
lines.english: O Nanak, chant such chants, that hearing them, He may enshrine love for you. ||8||12||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਗੁਣ ਊਪਜੈ ਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਲੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te gun aoopajai jaa prabh melai soe |
lines.english: Merit is obtained from the True Guru, when God causes us to meet Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:
